nodes.name: Cron — Morning Prep
nodes.notes: 6 AM daily — runs personal agent to prep morning briefing data.

nodes.name: Cron — Evening Prep
nodes.notes: 5:30 PM daily — runs personal agent to prep evening review summary.

nodes.name: Webhook — On Demand
nodes.notes: POST {task: 'string'} — Fabian can trigger the personal agent on demand.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO agent_sessions (agent_context, trigger_type, trigger_source, model, mcp_servers_used, input_summary) VALUES ('personal', $1, $2, 'claude-sonnet-4-6', ARRAY['postgres', 'google-sheets', 'filesystem'], $3) RETURNING id;

nodes.name: Launch Claude Code Agent
nodes.notes: Launches Claude Code in the personal agent directory with its CLAUDE.md and .mcp.json. --print for non-interactive mode. Output captured for logging.

parameters.query: UPDATE agent_sessions SET status = 'completed', completed_at = NOW(), output_summary = $1 WHERE id = $2;
INSERT INTO event_log (event_type, entity_type, source, metadata) VALUES ('AgentSessionCompleted', 'agent_session', 'personal_agent', jsonb_build_object('session_id', $1, 'trigger', $2));

INSERT INTO health_checks (component, last_run, status, message) VALUES ('personal_agent', NOW(), 'ok', $1) ON CONFLICT (component) DO UPDATE SET last_run = EXCLUDED.last_run, status = EXCLUDED.status, message = EXCLUDED.message;

meta.description: Triggers Claude Code personal agent (PIL layer) on schedule (morning prep, evening prep) or on demand via POST /webhook/agent-personal. Agent runs with MCP servers for Postgres, Google Sheets, and filesystem. All findings written to agent_findings as PROPOSED.
